title: Comparison on view malfunctions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 DOUBLE PRECISION, c3 VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (0, 1.5, 'test');
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c1, ABS(c2) AS abs_c2 FROM t1 WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v1 WHERE ABS(2) = abs_c2;
key_bug_features: COUNT() with ABS() condition on view
